comment: DitDah32 compliance gate signature manifest. Each entry records the expected 32-bit signature words a passing implementation must write to the signature region (starting at address 0x200). Hand-computed from the ISA semantics; future work: integrate a reference ISS so signatures are generated automatically.

tests.name: add
tests.description: RV32I add: positive sum, signed overflow wrap, x0 source

tests.name: andi
tests.description: RV32I andi: mask, sign-extended -1 immediate (identity), x0 source

tests.name: beq
tests.description: RV32I beq: branch-taken target writes good marker; branch-not-taken fallthrough writes good marker

tests.name: c_addi
tests.description: RVC c.addi: c.li + c.addi accumulation; c.addi negative immediate
